description_long: This is a vintage-style, round, blue metal alarm clock with a prominent black handle on top and two small black feet at the base for stability. The front face features large white Arabic numerals, luminous dots at each hour, and three clock hands for hours, minutes, and seconds, all set against a blue background. The clock face is protected by a clear glass or plastic cover, and the brand name and logo are visible above the center. The back of the clock displays three adjustment knobs and a winding key, as well as a small metal stand. The casing is primarily blue with black trim and metallic components, giving it a robust, retro appearance. The overall design suggests durability and portability, suitable for placement on a table or desk.
description: A vintage blue metal alarm clock with a round face, large white numerals, and a black handle on top. It features adjustment knobs and a winding key on the back, with a sturdy, retro design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue metal casing, black handle on top, and one of the black feet at the base.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying three adjustment knobs, a winding key, and a small metal stand, all set against the blue back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the blue casing, black handle, and the protruding adjustment knobs on the back.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the round clock face with large white Arabic numerals, luminous dots, three hands, and a clear protective cover.
attribute_face_design: Round blue face with large white Arabic numerals, luminous dots at each hour, and a central logo above the hands.
